scripts.build:customer:dev: cd apps/customer && eas build --profile development --platform all
scripts.build:customer:preview: cd apps/customer && eas build --profile preview --platform all
scripts.build:customer:prod: cd apps/customer && eas build --profile production --platform all
scripts.build:vendor:dev: cd apps/vendor && eas build --profile development --platform all
scripts.build:vendor:preview: cd apps/vendor && eas build --profile preview --platform all
scripts.build:vendor:prod: cd apps/vendor && eas build --profile production --platform all
scripts.submit:customer:ios: cd apps/customer && eas submit --platform ios --profile production --latest
scripts.submit:customer:android: cd apps/customer && eas submit --platform android --profile production --latest
scripts.submit:vendor:ios: cd apps/vendor && eas submit --platform ios --profile production --latest
scripts.submit:vendor:android: cd apps/vendor && eas submit --platform android --profile production --latest
scripts.lint: echo 'ESLint not configured. tsc --noEmit is the gate. Add eslint-config-expo + @typescript-eslint/parser when you want lint rules.'
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:customer && npm run typecheck:vendor
